---
title: "Diakité Mamadou Youssouf"
page-layout: full
---
```{=html}
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;700;800&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<div style="padding:3.5rem 6vw;max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;">

  <a href="index.html" class="link-back" style="margin-bottom:2.5rem;display:inline-flex;">← Praticiens</a>

  <!-- PROFILE HEADER -->
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:1.5rem;padding:2rem 0 2.5rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;flex-wrap:wrap;">

    <div class="profile-avatar">DY</div>

    <div style="flex:1;min-width:200px;">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.75rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:.5rem;">
        <h1 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(1.5rem,3.5vw,2rem);font-weight:800;color:#0f172a;margin:0;">Diakité Mamadou Youssouf</h1>
        <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.65rem;color:#94a3b8;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;">🇨🇮 Abidjan</span>
      </div>

      <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.78rem;color:#0ea5e9;margin:0 0 .9rem 0;letter-spacing:.04em;">Expert & Architecte Data</p>

      <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.35rem;margin-bottom:1.1rem;">
        <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:#f97316;border:1px solid rgba(249,115,22,.25);background:rgba(249,115,22,.08);padding:2px 9px;border-radius:4px;">MENTOR</span>
        <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:#a78bfa;border:1px solid rgba(167,139,250,.25);background:rgba(167,139,250,.08);padding:2px 9px;border-radius:4px;">SPEAKER</span>
        <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:#34d399;border:1px solid rgba(52,211,153,.25);background:rgba(52,211,153,.08);padding:2px 9px;border-radius:4px;">OPEN SOURCE</span>
      </div>

      <p style="font-size:.9rem;color:#475569;line-height:1.8;max-width:560px;margin:0 0 1.25rem 0;">
        Fondateur de from0tohero.dev. 1100+ apprenants formés en Data Engineering dans 40+ pays.
      </p>

      <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;">
        <a href="https://github.com/diakite-data" target="_blank" class="profile-link">
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" style="vertical-align:-2px;margin-right:4px;"><path d="M12 0C5.37 0 0 5.37 0 12c0 5.3 3.44 9.8 8.2 11.38.6.1.82-.26.82-.57v-2c-3.34.73-4.04-1.6-4.04-1.6-.54-1.4-1.33-1.77-1.33-1.77-1.08-.74.08-.73.08-.73 1.2.09 1.83 1.23 1.83 1.23 1.07 1.83 2.8 1.3 3.48 1 .1-.78.42-1.3.76-1.6-2.67-.3-5.47-1.33-5.47-5.93 0-1.3.47-2.38 1.23-3.22-.12-.3-.53-1.52.12-3.18 0 0 1-.32 3.3 1.23.95-.27 1.97-.4 2.98-.4 1 0 2.03.13 2.97.4 2.3-1.55 3.3-1.23 3.3-1.23.65 1.66.24 2.88.12 3.18.77.84 1.23 1.9 1.23 3.22 0 4.6-2.8 5.63-5.48 5.93.43.37.82 1.1.82 2.22v3.29c0 .32.22.68.83.57C20.57 21.8 24 17.3 24 12 24 5.37 18.63 0 12 0z"/></svg>GitHub
        </a>
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/mamadou-youssouf-diakite-083630135" target="_blank" class="profile-link">
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" style="vertical-align:-2px;margin-right:4px;"><path d="M20.45 20.45h-3.55v-5.57c0-1.33-.02-3.04-1.85-3.04-1.85 0-2.13 1.44-2.13 2.93v5.68H9.37V9h3.41v1.56h.05c.47-.9 1.63-1.85 3.35-1.85 3.59 0 4.25 2.36 4.25 5.43v6.31zM5.34 7.43a2.06 2.06 0 1 1 0-4.12 2.06 2.06 0 0 1 0 4.12zM7.12 20.45H3.56V9h3.56v11.45zM22.22 0H1.77C.79 0 0 .77 0 1.73v20.54C0 23.23.79 24 1.77 24h20.45c.98 0 1.78-.77 1.78-1.73V1.73C24 .77 23.2 0 22.22 0z"/></svg>LinkedIn
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- COMPÉTENCES TECHNIQUES -->
  <div style="margin:3rem 0;">
    <span class="f-label" style="margin-bottom:1.75rem;">// compétences techniques</span>
    <div id="skills-container"></div>
  </div>

  <hr class="f-hr" style="margin-bottom:2.5rem;">

  <!-- RÉALISATIONS -->
  <div>
    <span class="f-label" style="margin-bottom:1.25rem;">// réalisations</span>
    <a href="../realisations/index.html" class="f-card-link" style="margin-top:.75rem;display:block;">
      <div class="f-card f-card-hover">
        <div style="display:flex;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">
          <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.62rem;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#60a5fa;border:1px solid rgba(96,165,250,.25);background:rgba(96,165,250,.08);padding:2px 9px;border-radius:4px;">DATA</span>
          <span class="f-tag">Bootcamp</span>
        </div>
        <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:#0f172a;margin:0 0 .5rem 0;">Data Engineering Bootcamp</h3>
        <p style="font-size:.85rem;color:#475569;line-height:1.7;margin:0 0 1.1rem 0;">35 modules · 1100+ apprenants · 40+ pays. Le bootcamp Data Engineering complet en français.</p>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.35rem;margin-bottom:1.1rem;">
          <span class="f-tag">Python</span><span class="f-tag">Airflow</span><span class="f-tag">dbt</span>
          <span class="f-tag">Spark</span><span class="f-tag">GCP</span><span class="f-tag">Kafka</span>
        </div>
        <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.7rem;color:#0ea5e9;letter-spacing:.04em;">Demo →</span>
      </div>
    </a>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
const skillSections = [
  {
    label: "Langages & Frameworks",
    items: ["Python","PySpark","Scala","Spark-Scala","R","RShiny","Julia","Bash","Spark ML","Spark Streaming","Pandas","NumPy","Scikit-learn","FastAPI"]
  },
  {
    label: "Big Data & Streaming",
    items: ["Apache Spark","Hadoop HDFS","Apache Kafka","Apache Airflow","Hive","Apache Flink","RabbitMQ"]
  },
  {
    label: "Intelligence Artificielle & ML",
    items: ["Machine Learning","Statistiques","Modélisation prédictive","Data Mining","Deep Learning","CNN","NLP","Generative AI","MLOps","Model Deployment"]
  },
  {
    label: "Bases de Données & Stockage",
    items: ["PostgreSQL","MySQL","Oracle","TeraData","MariaDB","Elasticsearch","MongoDB","Neo4J","Couchbase","AWS S3","MinIO","Google BigQuery"]
  },
  {
    label: "Cloud & DevOps",
    items: ["AWS","Google Cloud Platform","Microsoft Azure","Docker","Kubernetes","Microsoft Fabric","Power BI","CI/CD","GitLab","GitHub","Git","Rundeck"]
  }
];

document.getElementById('skills-container').innerHTML = skillSections.map(sec => `
  <div style="margin-bottom:1.75rem;">
    <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#94a3b8;margin:0 0 .75rem 0;">${sec.label}</p>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.4rem;">
      ${sec.items.map(s => `<span class="skill-tag">${s}</span>`).join('')}
    </div>
  </div>
`).join('');
</script>
```
